# render-catalog

Contributes a `Catalog.FacetTable` tab to the Forge catalog showing all slot definitions aggregated across plugins, with group.member, slot id, and plugin columns.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Aggregated cross-plugin slots table in the Forge catalog.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Catalog.FacetTable` "Slots"
